ddls:
CREATE TABLE "go_terms" (
  "go_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the GO term */,
  "ontology" TEXT /* Ontology of the GO term */,
  "p_value_bonferroni" REAL /* Bonferroni-adjusted p-value */,
  "p_value" REAL /* Raw p-value */,
  "hits_in_term" INTEGER /* Number of hits in the term */,
  "term_size" INTEGER /* Size of the term */,
  "all_hits" INTEGER /* Total number of hits */,
  "all_background" INTEGER /* Total number of background genes */,
  "fold_enrichment" REAL /* Fold enrichment */,
  "source_database" TEXT /* Source database from which the GO term is derived */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the GO term data was last updated */,
  "references" TEXT /* Scientific references or publications related to the GO term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("go_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes_orf" (
  "gene_orf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene ORF */,
  "go_id" TEXT /* ID of the associated GO term */,
  "gene_orf" TEXT /* ORF identifier of the gene */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Organism to which the gene belongs */,
  "chromosome_location" TEXT /* Chromosomal location of the gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_orf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genes_orf_go_id FOREIGN KEY ("go_id") REFERENCES go_terms ("go_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes_standard" (
  "gene_standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene standard name */,
  "go_id" TEXT /* ID of the associated GO term */,
  "gene_standard_name" TEXT /* Standard name of the gene */,
  "gene_function" TEXT /* Brief description of the gene's function */,
  "gene_family" TEXT /* Family or class to which the gene belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genes_standard_go_id FOREIGN KEY ("go_id") REFERENCES go_terms ("go_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene association */,
  "gene_orf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene ORF */,
  "gene_standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene standard name */,
  "go_id" TEXT /* ID of the associated GO term */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the gene-GO term association */,
  "evidence_code" TEXT /* Evidence code supporting the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_associations_gene_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_standard_id") REFERENCES genes_standard ("gene_standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_associations_gene_orf_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_orf_id") REFERENCES genes_orf ("gene_orf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_associations_go_id FOREIGN KEY ("go_id") REFERENCES go_terms ("go_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization to which the user belongs */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "go_id" TEXT /* ID of the GO term being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or tool used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_go_id FOREIGN KEY ("go_id") REFERENCES go_terms ("go_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the experiment */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Description of the experimental methodology used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_go_terms" (
  "experiment_go_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment-GO term association */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "go_id" TEXT /* ID of the associated GO term */,
  "association_strength" REAL /* Strength of the association between the experiment and the GO term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_go_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_go_terms_go_id FOREIGN KEY ("go_id") REFERENCES go_terms ("go_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_go_terms_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_expression" (
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene expression record */,
  "gene_orf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene ORF */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "expression_level" REAL /* Expression level of the gene in the experiment */,
  "expression_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the expression level */,
  "control_expression" REAL /* Expression level in the control group for comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_gene_orf_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_orf_id") REFERENCES genes_orf ("gene_orf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_variations" (
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene variation */,
  "gene_orf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene ORF */,
  "variation_type" TEXT /* Type of genetic variation (e.g., SNP, deletion) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variation */,
  "clinical_significance" TEXT /* Clinical significance of the variation */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the variation in the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_variations_gene_orf_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_orf_id") REFERENCES genes_orf ("gene_orf_id")
)
